S

setAntennaId(int) - Method in class com.honeywell.rfidservice.rfid.AntennaPower
Set antenna id.

Set whether to return antenna id.
setAntennaPower(AntennaPower[]) - Method in class com.honeywell.rfidservice.rfid.RfidReader
Setting antenna power.
setAutoReconnect(boolean) - Method in class com.honeywell.rfidservice.RfidManager
Set whether to automatically try to reconnect if the device is accidentally disconnected
setBeeper(boolean, int, int) - Method in class com.honeywell.rfidservice.RfidManager
Set behavior of the beeper in device.
setData(boolean) - Method in class com.honeywell.rfidservice.rfid.TagReadOption
Set whether to return addition data.
setFreqHopTable(List<Integer>) - Method in class com.honeywell.rfidservice.rfid.RfidReader
Setting a frequency table for hopping.
setFrequency(boolean) - Method in class com.honeywell.rfidservice.rfid.TagReadOption
Set whether to return frequency.
setLEDBlink(boolean) - Method in class com.honeywell.rfidservice.RfidManager
Set whether the LED indicator on the device is blinking.
setOnTagReadListener(OnTagReadListener) - Method in class com.honeywell.rfidservice.rfid.RfidReader
Setup a tag data listener for asynchronous inventory.
setProfile(int) - Method in class com.honeywell.rfidservice.rfid.RfidReader
 
setProtocol(boolean) - Method in class com.honeywell.rfidservice.rfid.TagReadOption
Set whether to return protocol.
setReadCount(boolean) - Method in class com.honeywell.rfidservice.rfid.TagReadOption
Set whether to return read times.
setReadPower(int) - Method in class com.honeywell.rfidservice.rfid.AntennaPower
Set antenna power for reading data.

Setting device region.

Setting device region.
setRssi(boolean) - Method in class com.honeywell.rfidservice.rfid.TagReadOption
Set whether to return RSSI.
setSession(Gen2.Session) - Method in class com.honeywell.rfidservice.rfid.RfidReader
Set session mode for the Gen-2 compliant tag.
setStopPercent(int) - Method in class com.honeywell.rfidservice.rfid.TagReadOption
Set pause ratio.
setTimestamp(boolean) - Method in class com.honeywell.rfidservice.rfid.TagReadOption
Set whether to return timestamp.
setTriggerMode(TriggerMode) - Method in class com.honeywell.rfidservice.RfidManager
Set device trigger mode.
setWritePower(int) - Method in class com.honeywell.rfidservice.rfid.AntennaPower
Set antenna power for writing data.
stopRead() - Method in class com.honeywell.rfidservice.rfid.RfidReader
Stop asynchronous inventory.
syncRead(int) - Method in class com.honeywell.rfidservice.rfid.RfidReader
